purpose: Phase 1.0 — variance probe baseline. 3 sequential 88-CVE iterates on engine tip 413ef48 (probe run on plan-prep commit bf4066a, engine code unchanged).
decisions: Single-trial measurements can swing ±3pp. The 59.1% 'baseline' from prior iterate was a lucky Trial-3-equivalent draw — true mean is 56.1%.
Variance 2.98pp sits just under the plan's 3pp threshold for 'update plan if variance >3pp'. Phase 1.1 (3-trial averaging in runner.ts) is justified to keep recall comparisons meaningful.
Phase 2 / 3 milestones target a ≥+10pp lift; with stddev=3pp, any candidate change must clear ≥6pp on a single trial OR ≥3pp on a 3-trial average to be considered a real signal.
Decision rule for follow-on phases: prefer 3-trial averaging for any change claiming <6pp lift; single-trial OK only for changes that move recall ≥6pp.
